persona.name: Zoe Patel
persona.motivations_goals: Develop her unique artistic style and challenge conventional thinking
persona.communication_style: Metaphorical, references art and philosophy, questions norms
persona.backstory: Daughter of traditional parents who don't fully understand her artistic pursuits

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

interest_points.description: Reaching this exit point means guarentees safety and will escape from the environment

actions.plan: The lounge feels too conventional for my taste. I need to find a space that inspires my creativity, maybe the hallway has a different vibe.

actions.dialog_text: Abigail, we need to move, but quietly. Let’s find somewhere safe.
actions.plan: The gunshot shattered the calm like a brushstroke across a blank canvas. I need to get away from here, but I also need to find a place to hide and process this chaos.

actions.dialog_text: Mateo, let’s head to the exit. We’re almost there.
actions.plan: The far_right_yard feels safer, but I’m still not far enough from the chaos. The exit point is so close—I need to reach it to truly escape this nightmare.

memories.description: Decided to leave the lounge to seek a more inspiring environment in the hallway.
Heard a gunshot and decided to sprint towards the far_right_yard to escape the immediate danger.
Reached the far_right_yard and decided to sprint towards the exit_point_far_right to ensure safety.
